description_long: This object is a single, curved sausage resembling a classic hot dog, with a smooth, cylindrical form and rounded ends. The surface is a uniform, medium brown color, suggesting it is cooked, and there are no visible buns, condiments, or packaging. Both ends of the sausage display slightly darker, almost charred markings, which may indicate light grilling or browning. The texture appears semi-soft and slightly glossy, typical of a cooked sausage casing. The object is relatively slender and elongated, with a gentle curve along its length. Its size and appearance are consistent with a standard hot dog sausage commonly found in urban food settings such as street vendors or park concessions.
description: A curved, medium-brown sausage with rounded ends and slight charring, resembling a classic hot dog without a bun or condiments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length and gentle curve of the sausage, with both rounded ends visible.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the rounded tip and darkened, charred markings at the end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the full length and curve with both ends visible.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite tip, again showing the rounded end and darkened markings.
